document.title: Summary of Design Verification and Validation

sourceSummary.oneLine: Technical file summary of design verification and validation for the HnX-P1 Portable X-ray System.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides technical file evidence for applied standards, laboratory testing, risk management, software validation, usability validation, clinical study completion, and cybersecurity validation.
keyPoints: The document identifies the product as a Portable X-ray System, model HnX-P1.
The intended use covers handheld diagnostic imaging of body extremities and stand mounted diagnostic imaging of head, abdomen, extremities, and chest without a grid.
Biocompatibility test and animal test are marked N/A.
Risk management references EN ISO 14971:2019 and EN ISO/TR 24971:2020.
Cybersecurity validation references cybersecurity development, risk management, FMEA, threat modeling, SBOM, architecture view, test report, and labeling documents.

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit regulatory authority or jurisdiction is stated in the source text, despite source metadata indicating an FDA authority signal and source path referencing TFDA.

Standards evidence contains version inconsistencies: IEC 62304 appears as IEC 62304:2006/AMD1:2015 in Applied standard and IEC 62304:2015 in Software Validation; IEC 62366-1 appears as IEC 62366-1:2020 in Applied standard and IEC 62366-1:2015 in Usability.
Signature fields are listed but no actual signatures are represented in the extracted text.
